name: @skastr0/quasar-cli
description: Command line importer and client for Quasar AI agent sessions.

scripts.coverage:prefix-lcov: bun -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); const p="coverage/lcov.info"; let s=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8"); s=s.replace(/^SF:src\//gm,"SF:packages/cli/src/"); if(!s.includes("SF:packages/cli/src/adapters/")){console.error("coverage:prefix-lcov: missing packages/cli/src/adapters paths"); process.exit(1);} if(/^SF:src\//m.test(s)){console.error("coverage:prefix-lcov: residual SF:src/ paths"); process.exit(1);} fs.writeFileSync(p,s);'
scripts.coverage:pulsar: bun run test:coverage && bun run coverage:prefix-lcov && pulsar coverage ingest "$PWD/coverage/lcov.info" --format lcov "$(cd ../.. && pwd)"
